title: Suggestion
description: A single finding from an AI agent scan. This is the core data type in Kaicho — all agent output is normalized into this shape.

file.description: Relative file path from the repository root

line.description: Line number of the finding, or null for file-level suggestions

severity.description: Impact severity (critical > high > medium > low > info)

rationale.description: Explanation of the issue and its impact

suggestedChange.description: Concrete fix or mitigation, or null if no specific fix is suggested
